trivia_bullets.text: The Nessian Forest is the vast wilderness of Setessa, the Amazonian polis of Theros. The boar is the terror of those wilds — a 10/6 creature that forces all able blockers to engage it. The flavor text names Renata as leading the hunt, referencing a Setessan huntmaster who appears on Renata, Called to the Hunt from Theros Beyond Death [Scryfall].

"Renata led the best hunters in all of Theros on a quest to bring down the terror of the Setessan wilds." [Scryfall]. This references Renata, Called to the Hunt (THB no. 185), a Setessan demigod — the two cards form a flavor-text pair depicting the same hunt from different perspectives.

The Nessian Boar's design inverts the standard power-creature problem: it draws cards for every player who blocks it, turning its own resistance into a group-hug draw engine and making it genuinely risky to attack with in multiplayer Commander. EDHREC rank 12444 reflects niche adoption in big-green decks [Scryfall, EDHREC].
